case_title: REYES, FERNANDO VS WOODIN, ROBERT J

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-27-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-20-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 3/20/01 THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IF ONLY PLFT APPEARS ON 3/20/01, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT TO APPEAR.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODIN, ROBERT J STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
